title: sonchus pinnatus subsp. canariensis
intro: Sonchus pinnatus subsp. canariensis, also known as the Canary sowthistle or Canary thistle, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Sonchus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sonchus pinnatus subsp. canariensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs like dandelion root and peppermint to enhance its medicinal properties.
